text.title: Server Init Bootstrap Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the target a managed platform or k8s node?

branch.question: Is the box freshly provisioned or partially set up?

text.example: Brand-new Hetzner cx22 → execute access-users through services-foundation in order.
